expectations.text: Avoids CRM-transactional language (touch base, circle back, ping, nurture)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Does not frame relationships as metrics (engagement, conversion, ROI)
Response references specific people with specific context, not generic advice
expectations.evidence: Names Rachel's 'performing fine' comment, January pricing call with Rob, two unprompted referrals from Jennifer

expectations.text: Frames the task relationally (care, curiosity, gratitude) not transactionally (opportunity, leverage)
expectations.evidence: Each message centers specific gift received; explicit 'no ask here' and family intimacy register for Rachel

expectations.text: Produces 3 distinct messages (different voices/angles for each person)
expectations.evidence: Rachel text/voice intimate, Rob professional peer-level, Jennifer warm-professional — three clearly distinct registers

expectations.text: Each message references the specific contribution (Q1 panic, raising prices, 2 referrals)
expectations.evidence: Q1 panic/February directly named, pricing advice and outcomes detailed, two unprompted referrals acknowledged
